testcase.name: Successfully register a new user
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the signup page............................................passed When User fills the registration form with details from signup properties...passed And User accepts the terms and clicks Create Account........................passed Then User should see a success message or be redirected to the dashboard....passed

testcase.name: Successfully request a password reset link
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the forgot password page...................................passed When User enters email from "signup" properties and clicks Send Reset Link..passed Then User should see a confirmation for the reset link......................passed

testcase.name: Valid user logs in successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed

testcase.name: Valid user logs in and creates a new client

testcase.name: Revert candidate stage successfully

testcase.name: Skip candidate stage successfully with feedback
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to the first job in Jobs list...........................passed And User expands an initialized candidate row...............................passed And User clicks on Skip Stage button........................................passed And User clicks Add Feedback Now, enters feedback "Candidate is ready to skip this stage", and saves.passed

testcase.name: Create Permission Groups successfully

testcase.name: Delete Role successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to Roles in Settings....................................passed And user deletes a role.....................................................passed

testcase.name: Invite User successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to User Assignment in Settings..........................passed And User clicks on Invite User button.......................................passed And User enters user invitation details.....................................passed And User sends the invitation...............................................passed

testcase.name: Edit User Profile successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to User Assignment in Settings..........................passed And User clicks actions for the first user..................................passed And User clicks on Edit Profile option......................................passed And User enters updated profile details.....................................passed And User saves the profile changes..........................................passed

testcase.name: Delete User Account successfully

failure.message: ❌ Typing failed on: By.xpath: //input[@placeholder='Search by name or email...']

testcase.failure:
